title: BetterShields
description: client side qol features for shields
body:
![banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uku3lig/bettershields/1.19.4/banner.png)

**BetterShields** is a very simple mod aimed to fix sound inconsistencies with shields and colors the shield when it's raising or disabled.
(partially) fixes [MC-105608](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-105068).

## Dependencies
* [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
